inputs_required.notes: Search functionality for finding specific stories - would need a search term to test this capability

steps.screen: This is the main Hacker News homepage displaying a ranked list of technology news stories and discussions
steps.action: Tap the 'new' tab to navigate to the newest stories page
steps.goal: New stories page (newest content) - highest priority frontier item

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News 'new' page displaying the newest technology stories and discussions in chronological order
steps.action: Tap on the 'Custom Paper Pocket Yachts' story to view its detail page
steps.goal: Explore individual story detail pages (priority 0.9) and discover the comments/discussion interface structure

steps.screen: This is a story detail page for 'Custom Paper Pocket Yachts' showing the story content with navigation sidebar and company branding
steps.action: Click the Home link to navigate back to the Hacker News homepage
steps.goal: Navigate back to main Hacker News interface to continue exploring high-priority frontier items like comments pages and other sections

steps.screen: This is a website for Custom Paper Pocket Yachts displaying their homepage with navigation menu and company branding
steps.action: Navigate back using browser back button to return to Hacker News
steps.goal: Return to Hacker News application to continue exploring the frontier items, particularly the comments page and discussion interface

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News homepage displaying a ranked list of technology news stories and discussions
steps.action: Tap the 'comments' tab to navigate to the comments page
steps.goal: Explore the comments page and discussion interface (priority=0.9 frontier item)

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News comments page displaying recent comments from users across various stories and discussions
steps.action: Tap the 'past' tab to navigate to the past stories page
steps.goal: Explore the past stories page from the high-priority frontier to confirm the browse_past_stories capability

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News 'past' page displaying archived stories from April 5, 2026 with navigation to browse historical content by date
steps.action: Tap the 'ask' tab to navigate to the Ask HN section
steps.goal: Explore Ask HN section for community questions (priority=0.8 frontier item)

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News Ask HN section displaying user-submitted questions and discussion topics
steps.action: Tap the 'show' tab to navigate to the Show HN section
steps.goal: Explore the Show HN section for community showcases (priority=0.8 frontier item)

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News Show HN section displaying user-submitted projects and creations for community feedback
steps.action: Tap the 'jobs' tab to navigate to the jobs section
steps.goal: Explore the jobs section frontier item to confirm browse_jobs capability and discover the jobs page screen

steps.screen: This is the Hacker News jobs section displaying job listings from Y Combinator startups
steps.action: Tap on the Hightouchs job listing to view the job detail page
steps.goal: Job detail pages (priority=0.8) - confirming the job detail page capability and exploring the jobs workflow
